subcodes.first_line: O enraptured maidservant of God! Thy most eloquent letter, with its sublime and brilliant verses, was attentively perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المنجذبه نامه بلیغ با اشعار فصیح بدیع در نهایت دقت ملاحظه گردید منظوم
subcodes.subjects: @creativity in art, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
